name: Vercel v0
description: Vercel v0 — AI chat interface that generates production-ready React/shadcn UI components from text descriptions.

seo.title: Vercel v0 — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Vercel v0: Vercel v0 — AI chat interface that generates production-ready React/shadcn UI components from text descriptions.

when_to_use: Generating production-ready React components from text descriptions
Prototyping UI screens with shadcn/Tailwind from natural language
Building full page layouts with AI and exporting to Next.js code
Iterating on component designs through conversational AI prompting

cons: Locks you into shadcn and Tailwind
Still produces generic layouts by default
review.verdict: Currently the best prompt-to-React-UI tool on the market if you live in the shadcn and Vercel world.
review.best_for: React developers prototyping components with shadcn/ui and Tailwind
review.not_for: Teams on Vue, Svelte, or bespoke design systems outside shadcn
